title: P0: responses from deaddrop_post not OSCORE-protected
description: coap_dtn.c: deaddrop_post uses coap_respond which builds plain CoAP response. After unprotect_request, responses should use coap_oscore_protect_response with the piv and ctx to encrypt response per RFC 8613 and coap_oscore.h. Same for error paths. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-3y1i #codereview
close_reason: OSCORE protect_response integrated for deaddrop_post and confessions_post success and error paths using captured piv/ctx after unprotect. Helper added for protected responses. Code cleaned of duplicates. Verified via build.
